summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of an exceptionally tight, exploratory 1973 performance.
review: Reviewers rave about this show’s synchronicity and loose, hot playing from start to finish, calling it one of the band’s most exceptional outings. The recording is described as “fantastically crystal clear” and well‑balanced, making the listening experience pure Grateful Dead glory.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews award five stars and praise both the musical performance and recording quality without any criticism.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear, well‑balanced sound; no reported dropouts or muffiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Exceptional flow – the band is described as in sync, loose and hot from beginning to end.
